text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.Subscription t
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        t.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            t.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND t.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND t.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/
